skills.name: agent-browser
skills.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to inspect, test, or automate browser behavior: navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting page data, testing web apps, dogfooding Open Design previews, QA, bug hunts, or reviewing app quality. Prefer local Open Design preview URLs unless the user explicitly asks for external browsing.

skills.name: article-magazine
skills.description: Huashu / huashu-md-html-inspired magazine article layout for turning Markdown or notes into a polished long-form HTML essay.

skills.name: artifacts-builder
skills.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui).

skills.name: card-twitter
skills.description: Twitter quote or data card designed to pair with a post.

skills.name: card-xiaohongshu
skills.description: Xiaohongshu-style knowledge cards, arranged as a swipeable multi-card carousel.

skills.name: d3-visualization
skills.description: Teaches the agent to produce D3 charts and interactive data visualizations. A comprehensive D3.js skill with examples across chart types and techniques giving the agent expert-level knowledge to generate complex, interactive visualizations. Useful for editorial dashboards, reports, data-rich prototypes, and explanatory graphics.

skills.name: data-report
skills.description: Turns CSV, Excel, or JSON data into a polished visual report page.

skills.name: doc-kami-parchment
skills.description: Warm parchment canvas (#f5f4ed), monochrome ink-blue accent (#1B365D), one serif family, and editorial-grade typography.

skills.name: doc
skills.description: Read, create, and edit .docx documents with formatting and layout fidelity via OpenAI's document skill.

skills.name: docx
skills.description: Create, edit, and analyze Word documents with tracked changes, comments, and formatting. Useful for design briefs, copy docs, and review-ready deliverables.

skills.name: faq-page
skills.description: A Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) page with collapsible accordion sections, search functionality, and category filtering. Use when the brief asks for "FAQ", "help center", "questions", or "support page".

skills.name: flutter-animating-apps
skills.description: Implement animated effects, transitions, and motion in Flutter apps. Useful for native iOS/Android motion design.

skills.name: frontend-dev
skills.description: Full-stack frontend with cinematic animations, AI-generated media via MiniMax API, and generative art. Useful for hero pages and showcase sites.

skills.name: gsap-core
skills.description: Core GSAP API with gsap.to(), from(), fromTo(), easing, duration, stagger, and defaults. Production-grade web animation primitives.

skills.name: gsap-react
skills.description: GSAP React integration with useGSAP hook, refs, gsap.context(), cleanup, and SSR. Ships safe motion in React + Next.js apps.

skills.name: gsap-scrolltrigger
skills.description: GSAP ScrollTrigger for scroll-linked animations, pinning, scrub, and refresh handling. Useful for editorial sites and product pages.

skills.name: gsap-timeline
skills.description: GSAP Timelines with sequencing, position parameter, labels, nesting, and playback control. Useful for orchestrating multi-step motion sequences.

skills.name: hand-drawn-diagrams
skills.description: Generate hand-drawn Excalidraw diagrams from a prompt — animated SVG, hosted edit link, and PNG export. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and any agent supporting standard skill paths.

skills.name: login-flow
skills.description: Mobile login and authentication flow screens

skills.name: minimax-docx
skills.description: Professional DOCX document creation and editing using OpenXML SDK. Useful for branded reports, polished proposals, and template-based authoring.

skills.name: minimax-pdf
skills.description: Generate, fill, and reformat PDFs with a token-based design system and 15 cover styles. Useful for branded PDFs, e-guides, and reports.

skills.name: mockup-device-3d
skills.description: Static iPhone and MacBook 3D-style showcase with real HTML embedded on screens, glass-lens refraction, and 360-degree turntable composition.

skills.name: pdf
skills.description: Extract text, create PDFs, and handle forms. Useful for press releases, branded one-pagers, and printable design deliverables.

skills.name: poster-hero
skills.description: Vertical poster or Moments-style share image with strong visual impact.

skills.name: release-notes-one-pager
skills.description: Release notes one-page HTML with highlights, Added, Fixed, Breaking changes, Known issues, and Upgrade note. Writes explicit "None" style sections whenever the user does not provide details.

skills.name: resume-modern
skills.description: Modern minimal resume, single A4 page, ready for print or PDF export.

skills.name: shader-dev
skills.description: GLSL shader techniques for ray marching, fluid simulation, particle systems, and procedural generation. Useful for hero visuals and motion stills.

skills.name: social-reddit-card
skills.description: Realistic Reddit post card with vote rail and comment count, suited to video overlays or story sharing.

skills.name: social-spotify-card
skills.description: Spotify Now Playing-style card with album art, progress bar, and playback controls, suited to video overlays or personal homepages.

skills.name: social-x-post-card
skills.description: Realistic X post card with engagement metrics (likes, reposts, views), suited to video overlays or shareable image cards.

skills.name: threejs
skills.description: Three.js skills for creating 3D elements and interactive experiences in the browser — scenes, materials, controls, and post-processing.

skills.name: web-artifacts-builder
skills.description: Build complex claude.ai HTML artifacts with React and Tailwind. Anthropic's reference workflow for shipping rich, embeddable artifacts.
